name: basic_play_note
code:
play 60
sleep 1
play 64
sleep 1
play 67
sleep 1

name: basic_melody
code:
play 72
sleep 0.5
play 70
sleep 0.5
play 67
sleep 0.5
play 63
sleep 0.5
play 60
sleep 1

name: basic_rest_pattern
code:
play 60
sleep 0.5
sleep 0.5
play 64
sleep 0.5
sleep 0.5
play 67
sleep 1

name: basic_amp_variation
code:
play 60, amp: 0.3
sleep 0.5
play 60, amp: 0.6
sleep 0.5
play 60, amp: 1.0
sleep 0.5

name: basic_pan_stereo
code:
play 60, pan: -1
sleep 0.5
play 60, pan: 0
sleep 0.5
play 60, pan: 1
sleep 0.5

name: basic_release_control
code:
play 60, release: 2
sleep 2
play 64, release: 0.5
sleep 1
play 67, release: 4
sleep 4

name: basic_attack_release
code:
play 60, attack: 0.5, release: 1
sleep 2
play 64, attack: 1, release: 2
sleep 3

name: basic_sustain
code:
play 60, attack: 0.1, sustain: 1, release: 0.5
sleep 2
play 67, attack: 0.1, sustain: 0.5, release: 1
sleep 2

name: basic_descending_scale
code:
play 72
sleep 0.25
play 71
sleep 0.25
play 69
sleep 0.25
play 67
sleep 0.25
play 65
sleep 0.25
play 64
sleep 0.25
play 62
sleep 0.25
play 60
sleep 1

name: basic_octaves
code:
play :c3
sleep 0.5
play :c4
sleep 0.5
play :c5
sleep 0.5
play :c6
sleep 0.5

name: sample_kick
code:
sample :bd_haus
sleep 0.5
sample :bd_haus
sleep 0.5
sample :bd_haus
sleep 0.5
sample :bd_haus
sleep 0.5

name: sample_snare_kick
code:
sample :bd_haus
sleep 0.5
sample :sn_dub
sleep 0.5
sample :bd_haus
sleep 0.5
sample :sn_dub
sleep 0.5

name: sample_hihat
code:
4.times do
  sample :hat_bdu
  sleep 0.25
end

name: sample_amen_break
code:
sample :loop_amen
sleep sample_duration(:loop_amen)

name: sample_rate_change
code:
sample :bd_808, rate: 1
sleep 0.5
sample :bd_808, rate: 0.5
sleep 0.5
sample :bd_808, rate: 2
sleep 0.5

name: sample_choir
code:
sample :ambi_choir, amp: 0.8
sleep 3

name: sample_bass_hit
code:
sample :bass_hit_c
sleep 1
sample :bass_hit_c, rate: 0.8
sleep 1

name: sample_cymbal
code:
sample :drum_cymbal_open
sleep 1
sample :drum_cymbal_open, amp: 0.5
sleep 1

name: sample_bell
code:
sample :perc_bell
sleep 0.5
sample :perc_bell, rate: 1.5
sleep 0.5
sample :perc_bell, rate: 0.75
sleep 0.5

name: sample_reverse
code:
sample :loop_amen, rate: -1
sleep sample_duration(:loop_amen)

name: loop_basic_kick
code:
live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
end

name: loop_beat
code:
live_loop :beat do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 0.5
end

name: loop_melody
code:
live_loop :melody do
  play 60
  sleep 0.25
  play 64
  sleep 0.25
  play 67
  sleep 0.25
  play 72
  sleep 0.25
end

name: loop_hihat
code:
live_loop :hats do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.25
end

name: loop_two_layers
code:
live_loop :bass do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :hats do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.25
end

name: loop_counter
code:
live_loop :counter do
  play 60
  sleep 0.5
  play 64
  sleep 0.5
  play 67
  sleep 0.5
  play 60
  sleep 0.5
end

name: loop_conditional
code:
live_loop :pattern do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.25
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.25
end

name: loop_with_times
code:
live_loop :riff do
  3.times do
    play 60
    sleep 0.25
  end
  play 67
  sleep 0.25
end

name: loop_amen_slice
code:
live_loop :amen do
  sample :loop_amen, beat_stretch: 2
  sleep 2
end

name: loop_simple_bass
code:
live_loop :bass do
  use_synth :tb303
  play 36, release: 0.3, cutoff: 80
  sleep 0.5
end

name: synth_saw
code:
use_synth :saw
play 60, release: 1
sleep 1
play 64, release: 1
sleep 1

name: synth_prophet
code:
use_synth :prophet
play 60, release: 1.5
sleep 2
play 48, release: 2
sleep 2

name: synth_tb303
code:
use_synth :tb303
play 36, cutoff: 90, release: 0.5
sleep 0.5
play 36, cutoff: 70, release: 0.5
sleep 0.5
play 36, cutoff: 110, release: 0.5
sleep 0.5

name: synth_supersaw
code:
use_synth :supersaw
play 60, release: 2, amp: 0.5
sleep 2

name: synth_pluck
code:
use_synth :pluck
play 60
sleep 0.5
play 64
sleep 0.5
play 67
sleep 0.5

name: synth_pretty_bell
code:
use_synth :pretty_bell
play 72, release: 2
sleep 1
play 76, release: 2
sleep 1

name: synth_piano
code:
use_synth :piano
play 60, amp: 0.8
sleep 0.5
play 64, amp: 0.8
sleep 0.5
play 67, amp: 0.8
sleep 0.5

name: synth_hollow
code:
use_synth :hollow
play 60, release: 3
sleep 3

name: synth_blade
code:
use_synth :blade
play 60, release: 1.5, amp: 0.6
sleep 2
play 67, release: 1.5, amp: 0.6
sleep 2

name: synth_dark_ambience
code:
use_synth :dark_ambience
play 48, release: 4, amp: 0.5
sleep 4

name: chord_major
code:
play chord(:c4, :major)
sleep 1

name: chord_minor
code:
play chord(:a3, :minor)
sleep 1

name: chord_dom7
code:
play chord(:g3, :dom7)
sleep 1

name: chord_progression
code:
play chord(:c4, :major)
sleep 1
play chord(:f4, :major)
sleep 1
play chord(:g4, :major)
sleep 1
play chord(:c4, :major)
sleep 1

name: scale_major_play
code:
scale(:c4, :major).each do |n|
  play n
  sleep 0.25
end

name: scale_minor_pentatonic
code:
scale(:a3, :minor_pentatonic).each do |n|
  play n
  sleep 0.25
end

name: scale_blues
code:
use_synth :tb303
scale(:e3, :blues).each do |n|
  play n, release: 0.3, cutoff: 90
  sleep 0.25
end

name: chord_arpeggiate
code:
chord(:c4, :minor7).each do |n|
  play n
  sleep 0.25
end

name: scale_dorian
code:
use_synth :saw
scale(:d4, :dorian).each do |n|
  play n, release: 0.3, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.25
end

name: chord_dim_aug
code:
play chord(:b3, :dim)
sleep 1
play chord(:c4, :aug)
sleep 1

name: fx_reverb
code:
with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8 do
  play 60
  sleep 0.5
  play 64
  sleep 0.5
  play 67
  sleep 0.5
end

name: fx_echo
code:
with_fx :echo, phase: 0.25, decay: 4 do
  play 60
  sleep 1
  play 72
  sleep 1
end

name: fx_distortion
code:
with_fx :distortion, distort: 0.5 do
  use_synth :saw
  play 48, release: 1
  sleep 1
end

name: fx_slicer
code:
with_fx :slicer, phase: 0.25 do
  use_synth :supersaw
  play 60, sustain: 2, release: 0
  sleep 2
end

name: fx_flanger
code:
with_fx :flanger, feedback: 0.5 do
  use_synth :saw
  play 60, release: 2
  sleep 2
end

name: fx_wobble
code:
with_fx :wobble, phase: 0.5 do
  use_synth :tb303
  play 36, release: 2, cutoff: 100
  sleep 2
end

name: fx_lpf
code:
with_fx :lpf, cutoff: 80 do
  sample :loop_amen, beat_stretch: 2
  sleep 2
end

name: fx_hpf
code:
with_fx :hpf, cutoff: 90 do
  sample :loop_amen, beat_stretch: 2
  sleep 2
end

name: fx_bitcrusher
code:
with_fx :bitcrusher, bits: 8 do
  play 60
  sleep 0.5
  play 64
  sleep 0.5
  play 67
  sleep 0.5
end

name: fx_nested_reverb_echo
code:
with_fx :reverb, room: 0.7 do
  with_fx :echo, phase: 0.25, decay: 2 do
    play 72
    sleep 1
  end
end

name: random_rrand
code:
5.times do
  play rrand(48, 72)
  sleep 0.5
end

name: random_rrand_i
code:
8.times do
  play rrand_i(60, 84)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_choose
code:
8.times do
  play choose([60, 64, 67, 72])
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_dice
code:
8.times do
  play 60 + dice(12)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_one_in
code:
live_loop :maybe do
  sample :bd_haus if one_in(2)
  sample :hat_bdu if one_in(3)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_amp
code:
live_loop :ghost do
  play 60, amp: rrand(0.1, 0.8)
  sleep 0.5
end

name: random_seed
code:
use_random_seed 42
8.times do
  play rrand_i(60, 84)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_cutoff
code:
use_synth :tb303
live_loop :acid do
  play 36, cutoff: rrand(60, 120), release: 0.25
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_choose_scale
code:
live_loop :rand_scale do
  play choose(scale(:c4, :minor_pentatonic))
  sleep 0.25
end

name: random_sleep_variation
code:
live_loop :varied do
  play 60
  sleep [0.25, 0.5, 0.75].choose
end

name: tick_ring_basic
code:
live_loop :tick_test do
  play (ring 60, 64, 67, 72).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_ring_melody
code:
live_loop :riff do
  use_synth :pluck
  play (ring 60, 63, 67, 60, 65, 67, 70, 67).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_ring_samples
code:
live_loop :drums do
  sample (ring :bd_haus, :hat_bdu, :sn_dub, :hat_bdu).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_ring_amp
code:
live_loop :pulse do
  play 60, amp: (ring 0.8, 0.3, 0.5, 0.3).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_ring_sleep
code:
live_loop :rhythm do
  play 60
  sleep (ring 0.25, 0.25, 0.5, 0.25, 0.25, 0.5).tick
end

name: tick_scale_walk
code:
live_loop :walk do
  play (scale :c4, :major).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_chord_arp
code:
live_loop :arp do
  use_synth :pretty_bell
  play (chord :e4, :minor7).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_ring_synths
code:
live_loop :synth_cycle do
  use_synth (ring :beep, :saw, :pluck, :tb303).tick
  play 60, release: 0.3
  sleep 0.5
end

name: tick_knit_pattern
code:
live_loop :knit_beat do
  sample (knit :bd_haus, 3, :sn_dub, 1).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: tick_spread_euclidean
code:
live_loop :euclidean do
  sample :bd_haus if (spread 3, 8).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: bpm_120
code:
use_bpm 120
live_loop :fast do
  play 60
  sleep 0.25
  play 67
  sleep 0.25
end

name: bpm_80_slow
code:
use_bpm 80
play 60
sleep 1
play 64
sleep 1
play 67
sleep 1
play 72
sleep 1

name: bpm_140_dnb
code:
use_bpm 140
live_loop :dnb do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 0.5
end

name: timing_16th_notes
code:
use_bpm 100
live_loop :hats16 do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.25
end

name: timing_triplets
code:
use_bpm 90
3.times do
  play 60
  sleep 1.0/3
end
sleep 0.5

name: timing_dotted
code:
use_bpm 100
play 60
sleep 0.75
play 64
sleep 0.25
play 67
sleep 0.75
play 72
sleep 0.25

name: bpm_fast_arps
code:
use_bpm 160
use_synth :pluck
live_loop :fast_arp do
  play (scale :c4, :minor_pentatonic).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: timing_swing
code:
use_bpm 100
live_loop :swing do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.375
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.125
end

name: timing_half_notes
code:
use_bpm 120
use_synth :hollow
live_loop :pads do
  play chord(:c4, :sus4), release: 2
  sleep 2
end

name: bpm_change_mid
code:
use_bpm 100
play 60
sleep 1
play 64
sleep 1
use_bpm 140
play 67
sleep 1
play 72
sleep 1

name: combo_minimal_techno
code:
use_bpm 130

live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :hats do
  sleep 0.5
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :bass do
  use_synth :tb303
  play 36, cutoff: rrand(60, 110), release: 0.25
  sleep 0.5
end

name: combo_ambient_pad
code:
use_bpm 60

live_loop :pad do
  use_synth :hollow
  with_fx :reverb, room: 0.9 do
    play choose(chord(:a3, :minor7)), release: 4, amp: 0.5
    sleep 2
  end
end

name: combo_drum_and_bass
code:
use_bpm 170

live_loop :drums do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 0.25
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :bass do
  use_synth :tb303
  play (ring 36, 36, 39, 34).tick, cutoff: 80, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end

name: combo_house_groove
code:
use_bpm 124

live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :clap do
  sleep 1
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :hats do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: (ring 0.5, 0.3, 0.5, 0.3).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

name: combo_pluck_melody
code:
use_bpm 110

live_loop :melody do
  use_synth :pluck
  with_fx :echo, phase: 0.375, decay: 3 do
    play (scale :e4, :minor_pentatonic).tick, amp: 0.7
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

live_loop :beat do
  sample :bd_808
  sleep 0.5
end

name: combo_sync_cue
code:
live_loop :metro do
  cue :tick
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :player do
  sync :tick
  play 60
  sleep 0.5
  play 67
  sleep 0.5
end

name: combo_fx_chain
code:
use_bpm 100

live_loop :fx_demo do
  with_fx :reverb, room: 0.6 do
    with_fx :distortion, distort: 0.3 do
      use_synth :saw
      play (ring 48, 51, 55, 48).tick, release: 0.3
      sleep 0.25
    end
  end
end

name: combo_piano_chords
code:
use_synth :piano

live_loop :chords do
  play chord((ring :c4, :f4, :g4, :c4).tick, :major), amp: 0.6
  sleep 2
end

live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_808
  sleep 1
end

name: combo_prophet_pad
code:
use_bpm 72

live_loop :prophet_pad do
  use_synth :prophet
  with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8 do
    play chord(:d3, :minor7), release: 4, amp: 0.4
    sleep 4
  end
end

live_loop :bell do
  use_synth :pretty_bell
  play choose(scale(:d5, :minor_pentatonic)), amp: 0.3
  sleep (ring 0.5, 1, 0.5, 1.5).tick
end

name: combo_euclidean_beat
code:
use_bpm 120

live_loop :euclidean_kick do
  sample :bd_haus if (spread 5, 8).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :euclidean_hat do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4 if (spread 7, 16).tick
  sleep 0.125
end
